corrections.description: Article correctly ends with the D&C 101:77-80 scripture reference and quote
corrections.text: This was done, he said, "That every man may act in doctrine and principle pertaining to futurity, according to the moral agency which I have given unto him, that every man may be accountable for his own sins in the day of judgment" (D&C 101: 77-80).
